text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #1)
I did restart computer (it start in console) and try again but the same error.

BTW: what this two errors mean, please:

OFCommandLine::addGeneralOptions(const int longCols, ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
/usr/ports/graphics/dcmtk/work/dcmtk-DCMTK-3.6.5/ofstd/libsrc/ofcmdln.cc:1098:50:
error: use of undeclared identifier 'OFopenmode_in_nocreate'
STD_NAMESPACE ifstream cmdFile(filename, OFopenmode_in_nocreate); ^ 2
errors generated. [49/1251] /usr/local/libexec/ccache/c++

Thank you.
